name: io.github.fr0ster/mcp-abap-adt
description: MCP server for SAP ABAP ADT: repository analysis and CRUD for RAP and classic ABAP

environmentVariables.name: SAP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the ABAP system (e.g. https://my-system.example.com or a BTP ABAP service URL). Required to connect; without it the server starts in tool-inspection-only mode.

environmentVariables.name: SAP_AUTH_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: Authentication method: 'xsuaa' for JWT/OAuth2 (BTP ABAP Cloud) or 'basic' for username/password (on-prem).

environmentVariables.name: SAP_SYSTEM_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: System type, controls which tools are available (e.g. Programs are onprem-only).

environmentVariables.name: SAP_CLIENT
environmentVariables.description: ABAP client/mandant number (e.g. 100). Optional for BTP ABAP Cloud.

environmentVariables.name: SAP_JWT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: JWT bearer token for SAP_AUTH_TYPE=xsuaa. Provide this (or the SAP_UAA_* refresh-token set) for JWT auth.

environmentVariables.name: SAP_MASTER_SYSTEM
environmentVariables.description: System context for on-prem create/update operations (e.g. DEV).

environmentVariables.name: SAP_RESPONSIBLE
environmentVariables.description: Responsible user for on-prem create/update operations.
